'''pamungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamelist|enamelist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamelist|enamelist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pamungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmingith|pæmingith]] || [[word:pæmingij|pæmingij]] || [[word:pæmingish|pæmingish]] || [[word:pæmingi|pæmingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamumunguth|pamumunguth]] || [[word:pamumunguj|pamumunguj]] || [[word:pamumungush|pamumungush]] || [[word:pamumungu|pamumungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamunguth|pamunguth]] || [[word:pamunguj|pamunguj]] || [[word:pamungush|pamungush]] || [[word:pamungu|pamungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamufnguth|pamufnguth]] || [[word:pamufnguj|pamufnguj]] || [[word:pamufngush|pamufngush]] || [[word:pamufnguf|pamufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamunguthu|pamunguthu]] || [[word:pamunguju|pamunguju]] || [[word:pamungushu|pamungushu]] || [[word:pamunguku|pamunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamunguth|pamunguth]] || [[word:pamunguj|pamunguj]] || [[word:pamungush|pamungush]] || [[word:pamungu|pamungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamunguthul|pamunguthul]] || [[word:pamungujul|pamungujul]] || [[word:pamungushul|pamungushul]] || [[word:pamungukul|pamungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamunguthuthu|pamunguthuthu]] || [[word:pamungujuju|pamungujuju]] || [[word:pamungushushu|pamungushushu]] || [[word:pamunguku|pamunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamunguthun|pamunguthun]] || [[word:pamungujun|pamungujun]] || [[word:pamungushun|pamungushun]] || [[word:pamungukun|pamungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamunguthuoro|pamunguthuoro]] || [[word:pamungujuoro|pamungujuoro]] || [[word:pamungushuoro|pamungushuoro]] || [[word:pamungukuoro|pamungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
